# LTFGRS

LTFGRS is an R package that provides a unified interface to perform
several phenotype-based family genetic risk scores (FGRS) as well as
functions to perform the required data preparation and management steps.

The implemented methods are
[LT-FH++](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ajhg.2022.01.009),
[PA-FGRS](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39471805/), and [Kendler’s
FGRS](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33881469/). The primary focus of
the package is LT-FH++ and PA-FGRS. They share many similarities in
their models, since they are both based on the same underlying liability
threshold model with modifications. This package allows users to pick
and chose which elements of those methods they want to use. Notable
properties of the package are:

- Automatic identification of family members up to n’th degree.
- personalised thresholds for each included family that can account for:
  - age of diagnosis
  - censoring
  - cohort effects
  - sex
  - family-wise censoring
- mixture distribution to handle partially observed controls.

# Installation

You can install the development version of LTFGRS from GitHub with:

    remotes::install_github("EmilMiP/LTFGRS")

You can install the LTFGRS from CRAN with:

    install.packages("LTFGRS")

# Documentation and Tutorials

Documentation and tutorials for the package can be found in the [pkgdown
site](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/).

# Package index

## Family history estimators

Family history estimators available in the LTFGRS package.

- [`estimate_liability()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/estimate_liability.md)
  : Estimating the genetic or full liability for a variable number of
  phenotypes
- [`estimate_gen_liability_ltfh()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/estimate_gen_liability_ltfh.md)
  : Estimate genetic liability similar to LT-FH
- [`kendler()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/kendler.md) :
  Title Kendler's FGRS

## Data preparation functions

Functions used to prepare data for the family history estimators.

- [`attach_attributes()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/attach_attributes.md)
  : Attach attributes to a family graphs
- [`censor_family_onsets()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/censor_family_onsets.md)
  : Censor onset times in a family based on a proband's end of
  follow-up.
- [`familywise_censoring()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/familywise_censoring.md)
  : Censor Family Onsets for Multiple Families
- [`familywise_censoring_multi()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/familywise_censoring_multi.md)
  : Familywise Censoring for Multiple Outcomes
- [`familywise_attach_attributes()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/familywise_attach_attributes.md)
  : Wrapper to attach attributes to family graphs
- [`get_family_graphs()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/get_family_graphs.md)
  : Automatically identify family members of degree n
- [`get_onset_time()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/get_onset_time.md)
  : Calculate age of diagnosis, age at end of follow up, and status
- [`graph_to_trio()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/graph_to_trio.md)
  : Convert from igraph to trio information
- [`prepare_thresholds()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/prepare_thresholds.md)
  : Calculate (personalised) thresholds based on CIPs.
- [`prepare_thresholds_multi()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/prepare_thresholds_multi.md)
  : Prepare thresholds for multiple phenotypes
- [`prepare_graph()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/prepare_graph.md)
  : Construct graph from register information

## Simulation functions

Functions used to simulate data for the liability threshold model family
history estimators.

- [`construct_covmat()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/construct_covmat.md)
  : Constructing a covariance matrix for a variable number of phenotypes
- [`construct_covmat_multi()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/construct_covmat_multi.md)
  : Constructing a covariance matrix for multiple phenotypes
- [`construct_covmat_single()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/construct_covmat_single.md)
  : Constructing a covariance matrix for a single phenotype
- [`convert_age_to_cir()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/convert_age_to_cir.md)
  : Convert age to cumulative incidence rate
- [`convert_age_to_thresh()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/convert_age_to_thresh.md)
  : Convert age to threshold
- [`convert_cir_to_age()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/convert_cir_to_age.md)
  : Convert cumulative incidence rate to age
- [`convert_liability_to_aoo()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/convert_liability_to_aoo.md)
  : Convert liability to age of onset
- [`estimate_liability_single()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/estimate_liability_single.md)
  : Estimating the genetic or full liability
- [`estimate_liability_multi()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/estimate_liability_multi.md)
  : Estimating the genetic or full liability for multiple phenotypes
- [`simulate_under_LTM()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/simulate_under_LTM.md)
  : Simulate under the liability threshold model.
- [`simulate_under_LTM_multi()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/simulate_under_LTM_multi.md)
  : Simulate under the liability threshold model (multiple phenotypes).
- [`simulate_under_LTM_single()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/simulate_under_LTM_single.md)
  : Simulate under the liability threshold model (single phenotype).
- [`convert_format()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/convert_format.md)
  : Attempts to convert the list entry input format to a long format

## Internal functions and functions used in the estimator functions

The primary functions used in the family history estimators and some
helper functions.

- [`convert_observed_to_liability_scale()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/convert_observed_to_liability_scale.md)
  : Convert the heritability on the observed scale to that on the
  liability scale
- [`correct_positive_definite()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/correct_positive_definite.md)
  : Positive definite matrices
- [`extract_estimation_info_graph()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/extract_estimation_info_graph.md)
  : Title Internal Function used to extact input needed from graph input
  for liability estimation
- [`extract_estimation_info_graph_multi()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/extract_estimation_info_graph_multi.md)
  : Title Internal Function used to extact input needed from multi-trait
  graph input for liability estimation
- [`extract_estimation_info_tbl()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/extract_estimation_info_tbl.md)
  : Title Internal Function used to extact input needed for liability
  estimation
- [`extract_estimation_info_tbl_multi()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/extract_estimation_info_tbl_multi.md)
  : Title Internal Function used to extact input needed from multi-trait
  tibble input for liability estimation
- [`fixSexCoding()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/fixSexCoding.md)
  : Fixing sex coding in trio info
- [`get_all_combs()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/get_all_combs.md)
  : construct all combinations of input vector
- [`get_covmat()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/get_covmat.md)
  : Construct kinship matrix from graph
- [`get_relatedness()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/get_relatedness.md)
  : Relatedness between a pair of family members
- [`graph_based_covariance_construction()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/graph_based_covariance_construction.md)
  : Constructing covariance matrix from local family graph
- [`graph_based_covariance_construction_multi()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/graph_based_covariance_construction_multi.md)
  : Constructing covariance matrix from local family graph for multi
  trait analysis
- [`Gibbs_estimator()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/Gibbs_estimator.md)
  : Wrapper around the Gibbs Sampler that returns formatted liability
  estimates for the proband
- [`kendler_family_calculations()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/kendler_family_calculations.md)
  : Title Helper function for Kendler's FGRS
- [`PA_algorithm()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/PA_algorithm.md)
  : Title Pearson-Aitken algorithm to calculate mean values in truncated
  multivariate normal distributions
- [`rtmvnorm.gibbs()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/rtmvnorm.gibbs.md)
  : Gibbs Sampler for the truncated multivariate normal distribution
- [`tnorm_mean()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/tnorm_mean.md)
  : Title: Calculate the mean of the truncated normal distribution
- [`tnorm_mixture_conditional()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/tnorm_mixture_conditional.md)
  : Title: Calculates mean and variance of mixture of two truncated
  normal distributions
- [`tnorm_var()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/tnorm_var.md)
  : Title: Calculate the variance of the truncated normal distribution
- [`truncated_normal_cdf()`](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/reference/truncated_normal_cdf.md)
  : CDF for truncated normal distribution.

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [LTFGRS Workflow: Prepare Genetic Liability for
  Prediction](https://emilmip.github.io/LTFGRS/articles/LTFGRS_workflow_prediction.md):
